prompt: Vintage botanical oracle card illustration, vertical format with rounded corners. Aged parchment cream background with subtle foxing and distressed texture. Central image: a bearded Orthodox monk-bishop (Gregory Palamas) rendered in naturalistic 18th-century engraving style, warm brown and sepia tones, fine crosshatching and stipple shading. He holds an open book, golden divine light radiates softly from his chest. Around him: scattered botanical collage elements — olive branches, small blue flowers, a lit candle, four small scrolls. Thin simple black line border. Bottom section: decorative baroque scrollwork ornament banner in black with cream flourishes. Style: between antique natural history plate and Russian oracle card. Restrained, elegant, museum-catalog feel. Muted earth tones: sepia, olive green, dusty gold, cream, charcoal. No text.
